updated_conclusion: Provider setup-function worklists can now include native string-literal enrichment. On the 947 win64c client, the enriched compact worklist still covers all 99 setup-function clusters and 378 provider descriptors, and 13 clusters now carry direct function-local literal labels.

native_recognizers: RIP-relative x64 operands that target non-executable PE sections
ASCII C strings and UTF-16LE strings with configurable length and byte caps
virtual-only PE references are skipped instead of aborting the scan

literal_labeled_clusters.known_relationship: shared cluster containing the directlogin-adjacent and vt-varc/source-provider-adjacent descriptors

new_observations: The shared 0x1400CCA20 cluster is now explicitly labeled by the literals vt-varc and directlogin, which confirms that the two previously separate labels belong to one setup routine.
The Config provider setup cluster exposes settings-style labels: AutoSetup, CustomCursors, RemoveRoof, CursorScale, and Language.
The player and console provider clusters are directly corroborated by their own setup-function literals.
One discovered provider cluster is tied to Js5WorkerThread, giving the next concrete bridge back toward JS5/bootstrap work.

relationship_to_previous_milestones.provider-descriptor-setup-function-workl: Adds labels to the compact setup-function worklist without requiring the full clustered raw artifact.
relationship_to_previous_milestones.login-settings-provider-address-ref-func: Corroborates known setup functions with nearby strings.
relationship_to_previous_milestones.provider-descriptor-setup-function-clust: Turns unlabeled function clusters into subsystem-labeled reversing targets where literals are present.

bounded_inference.statement: Literal enrichment is now strong enough to prioritize cluster tracing: known login/settings labels are corroborated, and the Js5WorkerThread cluster is a high-value bridge toward JS5/bootstrap mapping.
bounded_inference.confidence: high for extracted literal strings, medium-high for labels where function-local literals match prior descriptor evidence

next_targets: Trace the Js5WorkerThread-labeled provider cluster around 0x14058F122-0x14058F508.
Trace the largest still-unlabeled cluster 0x1400E3AF0-0x1400E4DE4 and add additional non-string literal enrichment if needed.
Use the vt-varc/directlogin cluster labels to refine the shared 0x1400CCA20 setup-function summary.
